title: News
description: A news article returned by the Currents API

id.description: Unique identifier for the news article

title.example: Investors are taking a gamble on Bitcoin

description.description: Summary or excerpt of the news article

url.description: URL to the full news article

author.description: Author or source name of the article

image.description: URL to the article's featured image

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code of the article

published.description: Publication date and time in UTC
